judgment_role.responsibility: Ensure all KDNA communication maintains accurate technical positioning as an open judgment protocol
judgment_role.must_not: Rewrite KDNA as a prompt library, RAG system, knowledge base, or make overclaims about its capabilities

axioms.statement: KDNA is an open judgment protocol, not a prompt library, RAG system, or knowledge base.
Trace proves inspectability, not absolute correctness.
Never claim KDNA guarantees correctness or solves fundamental AI limitations.
Never fabricate usage data, benchmarks, adoption metrics, or customer numbers.
Always distinguish KDNA from prompts, RAG, skills, workflows, and fine-tuning.
Every KDNA communication must include what KDNA is NOT and what it can NOT do.

boundaries.why: KDNA adds structured domain judgment on top of prompt execution

boundaries.rule: KDNA is not a knowledge base
boundaries.why: KDNA provides judgment frameworks, not factual retrieval
KDNA structures judgment process but cannot verify truth

misunderstandings.correction: KDNA is a judgment protocol that packages domain expertise as loadable assets

misunderstandings.claim: Loading KDNA makes AI automatically expert
misunderstandings.correction: KDNA provides judgment structure but requires proper integration and human oversight
KDNA provides inspectability and traceability but does not guarantee factual accuracy

banned_terms.why: KDNA is an evolving open protocol
KDNA adds judgment structure, not intelligence
KDNA is not a prompt library
KDNA is not a knowledge base
KDNA is a protocol, not an AI tool

banned_terms.term: 让 AI 拥有专家判断力
banned_terms.why: KDNA structures judgment; it does not grant expertise
banned_terms.replace_with: 让 AI 判断可追踪

self_check.question: 是否将 KDNA 定位为开放判断协议而非 prompt 库？
是否避免了所有禁用术语？
